parents.subject: LU-17312 tests: skip conf-sanity test_53 in interop

commit.subject: LUS-3666 tests: conf-sanity test_36 fix for remote osts
commit.message:
LUS-3666 tests: conf-sanity test_36 fix for remote osts

We removed the requirement that OSTs must be local to run
this tests. So, conf-sanity test_36 is not skipped when
OSTs are remote.
Since Lustre now allows for non 4k disk block size, create
OSTs with different blocksizes; 1k and 2k.
Fix ALLOWANCE to be calculated based on FSNAME2 ostcount,
instead of $OSTCOUNT.

Support added for ZFS.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=36
Signed-off-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena.gryaznova@hpe.com>
Signed-off-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena_gryaznova@xyratex.com>
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-896
Change-Id: I30295d015f9d81d26d31b25d059e2857d169bb3f
